query:
SELECT 
  g.id,
  g.nome,
  g.email,
  g.telefone,
  COUNT(s.id) as totalSessoes,
  MAX(s.ultimoAcesso) as ultimoAcesso,
  MAX(s.createdAt) as primeiraSessao,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.ativo = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sessoesAtivas
FROM gestantes g
INNER JOIN sessoesGestante s ON s.gestanteId = g.id
GROUP BY g.id, g.nome, g.email, g.telefone
ORDER BY ultimoAcesso DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

SELECT 
  g.id,
  g.nome,
  g.email,
  g.telefone,
  COUNT(s.id) as totalSessoes,
  MAX(s.ultimoAcesso) as ultimoAcesso,
  MAX(s.createdAt) as primeiraSessao,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.ativo = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sessoesAtivas
FROM gestantes g
INNER JOIN sessoesGestante s ON s.gestanteId = g.id
GROUP BY g.id, g.nome, g.email, g.telefone
ORDER BY ultimoAcesso DESC
LIMIT 20;
